completed_phases.name: Control GUI Service Audit & IK Cleanup

remaining_phases.name: Isaac Sim Joint States Fallback Publisher

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to push commits to origin
human_actions_pending.context: vla_SO-ARM101 main is ahead of origin/main by 5 commits; isaac-sim-mcp so-arm101 branch is ahead of origin by ~5 commits. Both repos are green but unpushed.

decisions.decision: Phase 07.1 inserted mid-Phase-7 after Plan 07-01 landed
decisions.rationale: element-registry skill pattern surfaced a valuable generalization (widget registry) that unlocked agent-autonomous UAT for Plans 07-03/07-04. Insertion timing was deliberate — Plan 07-01's _register_button pattern is the template, and Plan 07.1's widgets benefit all later plans.

decisions.decision: 'ONE IK path' interpreted pragmatically, NOT as deletion of MoveIt KDL
decisions.rationale: chat-history investigation (session 695a7f93 turn 61) showed user's original voice was 'cleaning out functions duplicates and find one proper way' — not deletionist. MoveIt KDL retained for IK-tab freeform xyz+quaternion moves.

agent writes to widgets on non-active tabs were invisible in the GUI; auto-switching closes the loop between agent action and visual feedback. Implemented as 15 lines in set_widget_value pre-write dispatch.

decisions.decision: Phase 6 regression gate verdict: PASS (equivalent to HEAD)
decisions.rationale: Ran 3 cycles per version. Both versions fail at similar rates from pre-existing causes (block spawn outside IK reach, OMPL budget after post-release pose). Diff audit on motion-critical code shows zero logic changes — only renames. Three flakiness follow-ups deferred to Phase 10.

next_action: When resuming: /gsd-discuss-phase 8 to start Isaac Sim Extension Cleanup. Phase 8 mirrors Phase 7's audit pattern but on the MCP socket side of soarm101-dt/extension.py.
context_notes: Phase 7 + 07.1 shipped 9 plans total + 2 sparks. control_gui.py grew from 3816 to ~5100 lines — bulk is registries, factories, services, and tests. Every GUI interactive element is now CLI-addressable (dump_services for buttons, list_widgets for everything else). Ready to apply the same pattern to the Isaac Sim extension's MCP surface area.
